Glossary
Data Tools, Apps, & Maps
Tools to customize searches, view specific data sets, study detailed documentation, and access time-series data.
Open Data
EIA's free and open data available as API, Excel add-in, bulk files, and widgets
EIA Beta
Come test out some of the products still in development and let us know what you think!
Open Source Code
EIA's open source code, available on GitHub.
All Reports & Publications
EIA Survey Forms
Forms EIA uses to collect energy data including descriptions, links to survey instructions, and additional information.
Email Updates
Sign up for email subscriptions to receive messages about specific EIA products
RSS Feeds
Subscribe to feeds for updates on EIA products including Today in Energy and What's New.

Data Tools, Apps, and Maps
This page has no sub-navigation.
Skip to page content
.
All
Maps
Tools
Data Browsers
Dashboards
API Query Browser
Direct access to EIA time series data for electricity, petroleum, and natural gas.
Browse data »
Hourly Electric Grid Monitor
Hourly actual and forecast electricity generation and demand by U.S. region and power authority.
Browse data »
EIA Excel Data Add-In
Download EIA energy data and economic data for the St. Louis Federal Reserve (FRED) directly to your spreadsheet.
Discover tool »
U.S. State Energy Portal
Maps, data, rankings, infrastructure layers for energy production, consumption, and prices by state.
Explore States »
Residential Energy Consumption Survey Dashboard
With selected residential energy site consumption, expenditures, and household characteristics from the 2020 RECS
Residential Energy Consumption Survey Dashboard »
Energy Calculator
Energy conversion calculators for many different units of measure.
Discover tool »
Electricity Data Browser
Data on U.S. electricity generation, transmission, consumption, and prices.
Browse data »
AEO Table Browser
Graph and view projections of U.S. energy supply, demand, and price projections through 2050.
Browse data »
Bulk Download Facility
Entire contents of each EIA API data set in a single zip file.
Discover tool »
Coal Data Browser
Data, charts, and maps of coal production, imports, exports, shipments, and individual mines.
Browse data »
Total Energy Data Browser
Access and graph data on U.S. energy supply, demand, prices, and environmental emissions from 1973 to current data.
Browse data »
International Portal
Access detailed international energy data (country and region specific)
Browse data »
Crude Import Tracking Tool
Maps and data for petroleum imports by type, crude oil grade, location, and country of origin.
Discover tool »
Status of U.S. Nuclear Outages
Maps and information on U.S. nuclear power plants and outages.
Browse data »
International Energy Statistics
Detailed international energy data
Browse data »
IEO Table Browser
Graph and view projections through 2050 on world energy supply and demand by region of the world and by country, by selected alternative scenarios.
Browse data »
STEO Data Browser
Short-term forecasts of U.S. energy supply, demand, prices, imports/exports for the next 18-24 months.
Browse data »
Natural Gas Company-level Query System
Natural gas respondent information by survey, year, company and area.
Browse data »
Alternative Fuel Vehicle Data Browser
Data about fuel use and number of vehicles for alternative fuel vehicle fleets.
Browse data »
New England Dashboard
Interactive view of energy commodities that can influence energy consumption, prices, flows, and security in the region.
New England Dashboard »
